view.title: Validate persona scenario #3
view.subtitle: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

blocks.title: Persona Scenario Validate 3 blocked
blocks.message: Step blocked: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Error
items.value: Exploratory validation blocked: Insufficient evidence to validate the persona scenario.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where the persona runs a consolidated report for multiple clients. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the functionality of generating such reports. The linked use cases and prior steps indicate gaps in the necessary features, such as mobile clock-in/out and geofencing, which are critical for the scenario's success, leading to an inconclusive status.
